nasb.text: Now no blacksmith could be found in all the land of Israel, for the Philistines said, “Otherwise the Hebrews will make swords or spears.”

esv.text: Now there was no blacksmith to be found throughout all the land of Israel, for the Philistines said, “Lest the Hebrews make themselves swords or spears.”

cnv.text: 那時，以色列全地找不到一個鐵匠，因為非利士人說：“恐怕希伯來人製造刀劍或槍矛。”

ccb.text: 那时，以色列全境找不到一个铁匠，这是因为非利士人的禁令，以免希伯来人制造刀枪。
